commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And also by the hand of the prophet Jehu the son of Hanani came the word of the LORD against Baasha, and against his house, even for all the evil that he did in the sight of the LORD, in provoking him to anger with the work of his hands, in being like the house of Jeroboam; and because he killed them. The evil, to punish it. (Menochius) He, God, slew him, Baasa, (Calmet) or "because the latter slew "Nadab (Grotius) God punished his usurpation and murders. (Calmet) That is, is not found in Hebrew, Chaldean, Septuagint, nor in some Latin copies. (Estius) Hence Jehu might survive to admonish Josaphat,.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
